title: 愿光常在
scene: 暖色灯光、缎带与祝福花饰构成庆贺背景，中央加入中文文案“愿你所行皆坦途 / 所遇皆温柔”。
prompt: Create one premium vertical wallpaper for category 文字 / 祝福 with warm lantern glow, ribbons, festive floral accents, and an elegant central text area. Render the final wallpaper with visible Chinese text: “愿你所行皆坦途 / 所遇皆温柔”. Premium blessing wallpaper, strict 9:16 portrait composition, no watermark, no logo, no border.
author: OpenAI Codex
copy:
愿你所行皆坦途
所遇皆温柔
